pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 66: api('add_survey', [session, 0, 'Global Tech Summit 2024', 'en']); task.json description confirms this title

Task description states 'adding two new mandatory attributes: Organization and Job Title'; verifier.py line 68 confirms lookup for 'Organization'; LimeSurvey documentation confirms custom attributes can be named with user-friendly labels
Task description states 'adding two new mandatory attributes: Organization and Job Title'; verifier.py line 87 confirms lookup for 'Job Title' attribute

Task description: 'Enable public registration'; export_result.sh line 29 queries lime_surveys table for allowregister field; LimeSurvey documentation confirms 'Y' is the correct database value for enabling public registration

Task description: 'Enable public registration with CAPTCHA protection'; export_result.sh line 31 queries lime_surveys table for registration_captcha field; LimeSurvey documentation confirms 'Y' is the correct value for 'Use CAPTCHA for Registration'

privileged_info_summary: The task configures LimeSurvey version 6 (martialblog/limesurvey:6-apache) with a synthetically generated survey titled 'Global Tech Summit 2024'. The survey is created programmatically via LimeSurvey's JSON-RPC API (http://localhost/index.php/admin/remotecontrol) using admin credentials (admin/Admin123!). The task requires enabling public registration (allowregister='Y') with CAPTCHA protection (registration_captcha='Y') in the lime_surveys database table, and adding two mandatory custom attributes ('Organization' and 'Job Title') to the survey participants token table via the lime_surveys_token_attributes table. Success is verified by a Python script that queries the database and checks for these settings and attributes.
